identity_preservation: Candidate preserves the same proof-envelope-check field identity and interface.
regression_results: support-state promotion remains blocked without review
authority_check: candidate stays within the same authority ceiling and does not expand write or approval rights
evaluator_independence: Independent review and proof-readiness validation are separate from the candidate implementation.
residual_escrow: residual: fixture commit is not a deployed replacement
rollback_plan: Rollback by restoring impl://proof-envelope-check-v0 and replaying proof-record review manually.
canary_scope: canary completed for local proof-record checks before fixture commit
non_claims: does not prove runtime replacement behavior
